items.name: Steamed Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Juicy steamed dumplings filled with flavorful minced seasoned with traditional Nepali herbs and spices and served with tangy tomato chutney.

items.name: Chilli Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Crispy fried dumplings tossed in a spicy, tangy Nepali-style chilli sauce with onions, capsicum and fresh herbs for a bold, flavorful kick.

items.name: Jhol Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Steamed dumplings served in a chilled, flavorful broth made from sesame, peanuts, soybeans and fresh blend of coriander, mint and nepali spices.

items.name: Deep/Pan Fried Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Crispy deep or pan fried dumplings with a golden crust, packed with savory spiced meat and served with tangy Nepali chutney.

items.name: Sadeko Momo (10 pcs)
items.description: Steamed dumplings tossed in a spicy, tangy marinade with mustard oil, fresh herbs, onions, and Nepali spices for a bold, flavorful kick.

items.name: Chowmein / Noodles
items.description: Stir-fried noodles tossed with fresh vegetables and Nepali-style seasonings for smoky, savory street-food classic.

items.name: Bhutan Set
items.description: A spicy goat offals (tripe, fatty runner and bhutan) served with aalo aachar, beaten rice, roasted soybeans and side of tomato chutney.

items.name: Choila
items.description: Smoked grilled meat marinated with mustard oil, garlic, chilli, sichuan pepper served with beaten rice, aalo aachar and roasted soybeans.

items.name: Chicken Curry (Med)
items.description: Slow cooked chicken with onion, tomatoes, garlic, ginger and blend of spices like cumin, coriander, and sichuan pepper and herbs.

items.name: Goat Curry (Med)
items.description: Slow cooked goat (bone-in) with onion, tomatoes, garlic, ginger and blend of spices like cumin, coriander, and sichuan pepper and herbs.

items.name: Daal (Med)
items.description: Lentil soup spiced with turmeric and tempered with cumin, ginger and garlic.

items.name: Curry & Rice Deal
items.description: A hearty curry (non veg) served with steamed basmati rice.

items.name: Daal & Rice Deal
items.description: A hearty daal served with steamed basmati rice.

items.name: Chatpate
items.description: A spicy, tangy Nepali street snack made with puffed rice, potatoes, fresh veggies, crunchy noodles, and zesty spices, all tossed in mustard oil and lemon juice for bold flavor.

items.name: Panipuri (10 pcs)
items.description: Crispy puris stuffed with spiced potatoes and herbs served with tangy tamarind water for a burst of sweet, sour and spicy Nepali-style street flavor.

items.name: Pani Puri Takeaway (12 pcs)
items.description: Crispy puris stuffed with spiced potatoes and herbs served with tangy tamarind water for a burst of sweet, sour and spicy Nepali-style street flavor.

items.name: Sausage (2 pcs)
items.description: Nepalese style juicy deep fried sausages served hot with tangy tomato chutney or spicy aachar, perfect as a quick, flavorful street-style.

items.name: Samosa (2 pcs)
items.description: A deep-fried pastry filled with spiced mashed potatoes, peas and traditional herbs. Crispy on the outside and savory inside and served with tangy tomato chutney.

items.name: Piro Aalu
items.description: A spicy and tangy street-style snack made with sliced fried potatoes mixed chopped onions, chillies, mustard oil, lemon juice and a blend of spices.

items.name: Aalu Chops (4 pcs)
items.description: Deep-fried mashed potatoes patties spiced with Nepali herbs and coated in a crispy batter served with tangy tomato chutney.

items.name: Pakoda (6 pcs)
items.description: A crispy deep-fried snack made from gram flour batter mixed with vegetables and herbs added with Nepali spices. It is served with tangy tomato chutney.

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Crispy fried chicken pieces tossed in a spicy, tangy sauce with onions, capsicum, green chillies and bold himalayan spices to make it favorite appetizer.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Crispy paneer cubes tossed in a spicy, tangy, Nepali-style chilli sauce with onions, capsicum, and bold himalayas spices - a popular fusion.

items.name: Sausage Chilli
items.description: A flavorful fusion dish made with sliced chicken sausages stir-fried with onions, capsicum, green chillies, and Nepali-style spicy, tangy sauce.
